response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack/web engineer, but is fundamentally misaligned with this role. He lacks the required native-level Japanese proficiency, has no demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, and shows no background in L2/L3 networking, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), or embedded LAN-switch firmware. His C experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint on a C IDE product, far from the strong UNIX C proficiency required.
strengths: Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-latency systems work in DLang
Long, continuous engineering career with Linux, Docker, and CI/CD experience
Strong testing culture and software craftsmanship (TDD, test tooling authorship)
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a hard requirement for this role
No Linux kernel, embedded networking, switch, or security-protocol experience
Career trajectory is web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js), not embedded firmware in C

key_factors.factor: General systems programming and Linux familiarity
